title: NoGoLog and survivor-history schemas (Research Governance v0.1)
description: Two append-only logs that record refuted candidates and surviving candidates respectively. Both logs are JSONL: one JSON object per line, no trailing comma. Edits are forbidden; corrections are added as new entries that reference the original.

FormalWitness.description: Either a 'path:line' pointer into the repository, or null when no formal witness exists yet.

candidate_id.description: Identifier of the candidate package under pnp3/Candidates/.

structural_pattern.description: Short, reusable label for the structural pattern of the failure. E.g. 'truth-table hardwiring of arbitrary PpolyFormula witness'.

counterexample_family.description: Family of counterexamples that defeats the route. E.g. 'singleton family computing the truth table of the candidate language'.

why_generalizes.description: Why the same failure recurs across superficially different candidates.

oneOf.description: Path to a Lean test that reproduces the failure mode.

applicable_spec_version.description: Value of [meta].spec_version from spec/target.toml at time of entry.

attack_suite_version.description: Version tag of the bench/SmokeProbe attack suite at time of entry.

supersedes.description: Optional reference to an earlier entry being corrected.

notes.description: Free-form notes. Must not contain claims that contradict the failure_class.

id.description: Globally unique attempt id, monotonically assigned. Each Verifier+Critic cycle produces exactly one entry.

candidate_id.description: Identifier of the candidate package under pnp3/Candidates/.

seed_pack_id.description: Optional pointer to the seed pack under seed_packs/<id>/ that this attempt is responding to.

verifier_status.description: Outcome of scripts/verify_candidate.sh on this candidate.

verifier_failure_class.description: Populated only when verifier_status = FAIL; null otherwise.

critic_status.description: Status of the structured Critic report (spec/critic_protocol.md). 'not_run' if Critic has not yet produced a critic_report.md for this attempt; 'pass' if all six attack sections classified the candidate as 'no break found'; 'fail' if any attack section produced a documented break.

critic_break_class.description: Populated only when critic_status = fail; classifies the dominant Critic-found break.

oneOf.description: Path to the structured critic_report.md file (typically pnp3/Candidates/<candidate_id>/critic_report.md).

supersedes.description: Optional reference to an earlier attempt being corrected (e.g. after a Verifier or Critic re-run).

notes.description: Free-form notes. Must not contain claims that contradict the recorded statuses.
